_readme: AU Faculty Research Connections Tool — Curated Faculty List
_instructions: Add each current AU faculty member as an entry in the 'faculty' array.
The 'openalex_id' field is optional — leave blank and the tool can look it up by name.
Required: name, school. Everything else is optional but improves the network.
Schools: CAS | SPA | SIS | WCL | SOC | Kogod | SOE
Copy this file alongside au-faculty-network.html and it will take precedence over the live API.
_source: Replace this file with a CSV export from AU HR or the faculty directory at american.edu/faculty

_how_to_populate.from_au_website: Visit https://www.american.edu/faculty/ and export or copy the faculty directory listing. Each school has its own page.
_how_to_populate.from_hr_export: Ask HR for a CSV with columns: First Name, Last Name, School/College, Department, Title. Then paste into this JSON.
_how_to_populate.finding_openalex_ids: Search https://openalex.org/authors?filter=display_name.search:FIRSTNAME+LASTNAME,affiliations.institution.id:I181401687 — copy the 'id' field from the matching result.
_how_to_populate.bulk_lookup_script: A Python script (openalex-enricher.py, in this folder) can auto-fill openalex_id and research_areas for every faculty member in this list.
